name: 1. 规范符合度
importance: 没有 SKILL.md 和 frontmatter，agent 无法识别和加载该 skill。
importanceEn: Without SKILL.md and frontmatter, the agent cannot recognize or load the skill.
source: Anthropic 官方 README："Skills are folders... with a SKILL.md file... frontmatter requires name and description."
sourceEn: Anthropic's official README: "Skills are folders... with a SKILL.md file... frontmatter requires name and description."

name: 2. Agent 兼容性
importance: skill 再好，不支持你用的 agent 就无意义。
importanceEn: A great skill is meaningless if it doesn't support the agent you use.
source: Vercel skills CLI README 列出支持 70+ agent；agentskills.io 定义 discovery/activation/execution 三阶段加载机制。
sourceEn: Vercel's skills CLI README lists 70+ supported agents; agentskills.io defines the three-stage loading mechanism (discovery / activation / execution).

name: 3. 功能描述准确完整
importance: 决定 agent 能否在正确时机激活该 skill，以及用户能否预判其能力边界。
importanceEn: Determines whether the agent activates the skill at the right time, and whether users can predict its capability boundary.
source: Anthropic 官方 skill 模板要求 description 必须说明 "what this skill does and when to use it"。
sourceEn: Anthropic's official skill template requires the description to specify "what this skill does and when to use it".

name: 4. 实用示例与边界说明
importance: 示例决定用户能否快速上手；边界说明避免误用和幻觉。
importanceEn: Examples decide whether users can onboard quickly; boundary notes prevent misuse and hallucinations.
source: Anthropic 官方模板包含 `## Examples` 和 `## Guidelines`；Terryc21/skill-reviewer 的 discoverability lens 专门检查激活词是否清晰。
sourceEn: Anthropic's official template includes `## Examples` and `## Guidelines`; Terryc21/skill-reviewer's discoverability lens specifically checks that activation keywords are clear.

name: 5. 文档结构清晰度
importance: 影响可维护性和团队协作。结构混乱的 skill 难以复用。
importanceEn: Affects maintainability and team collaboration. A poorly structured skill is hard to reuse.
source: 来自 skill-reviewer 的 architecture lens 和 parseability lens。
sourceEn: From skill-reviewer's architecture lens and parseability lens.

name: 6. 活跃度
importance: AI 工具链、模型 API、agent 协议变化极快，长期不更新的 skill 可能失效。
importanceEn: AI toolchains, model APIs and agent protocols change fast — long-unmaintained skills may silently break.
source: GitHub `pushedAt` / `updatedAt`；Anthropic README 免责声明强调 "Always test skills thoroughly"。
sourceEn: GitHub `pushedAt` / `updatedAt`; Anthropic's README disclaimer stresses "Always test skills thoroughly".

name: 7. 可信与安全
importance: skill 可执行脚本、读写文件、调用网络，来源不明可能带来数据泄露或破坏。
importanceEn: Skills can run scripts, read/write files, call the network — unverified sources risk data leakage or destruction.
source: skill-reviewer 的 safety lens 检查备份、恢复、敏感操作；许可证信息来自 GitHub API。
sourceEn: skill-reviewer's safety lens checks backups, recovery, and sensitive operations; license info comes from the GitHub API.
